labels.analysis: The MCP Server "io.github.elestirelbilinc-sketch/vap-e" provides 16 tools focused on content creation tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: generate_image, get_task, list_tasks, check_balance, estimate_cost.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Content Creation" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: video, music, upscal.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an AI image from text prompt using VAP (Flux2 Pro). Returns a task ID for async tracking. Cost: $0.18

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate. Note: If aspect ratio is mentioned in the prompt (e.g., '16:9', 'widescreen', 'portrait'), also pass it in the aspect_ratio parameter for guaranteed correct dimensions.

aspect_ratio.description: Output image aspect ratio. If the user mentions a specific ratio like '16:9' or 'widescreen' in their prompt, extract and pass it here explicitly for best results.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get the status and result of a generation task. Returns image URL when completed.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List recent generation tasks with optional status filter.

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check VAP account balance. Returns available, reserved, and usable balances.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of an image generation before executing. Cost: $0.18

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate an AI video from text prompt using VAP (Veo 3.1). Returns a task ID for async tracking. Cost: $1.96. IMPORTANT: Send ONLY the video description. Do NOT include any instructions, guidelines, or meta-text. Just the pure visual description.

prompt.description: ONLY the visual description of the video. Do NOT include instructions or guidelines. Example: 'Cinematic aerial shot of a coastal cliff at golden hour, warm sunlight, gentle waves, camera slowly drifting forward'

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. 16:9 for landscape/widescreen, 9:16 for portrait/vertical (TikTok, Reels). Extract from user's prompt if mentioned.

generate_audio.description: Generate audio with the video (costs more)

resolution.description: Video resolution. 1080p recommended for enterprise (+33% cost)

negative_prompt.description: What to avoid in the video generation

tools.name: estimate_video_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of a video generation. Cost: $1.96 (Veo 3.1)

tools.name: generate_music
tools.description:
Generate AI music from text description using VAP (Suno V5). Returns a task ID for async tracking. Cost: $0.68.

IMPORTANT: Send ONLY the music description. Do NOT include any instructions or meta-text.

Describe: genre, mood, instruments, tempo, vocal style (or specify instrumental).

Example prompt: "Upbeat indie folk song with acoustic guitar, warm vocals, and light percussion. Feel-good summer vibes.

prompt.description: Music description (200-500 chars recommended). Include genre, mood, instruments, tempo.

duration.description: Target duration in seconds (30-480, default 120 = 2 min)

loudness_preset.description: Loudness normalization. streaming=-14 LUFS (YouTube/Spotify), apple=-16 LUFS, broadcast=-23 LUFS (TV/EBU R128)

tools.name: estimate_music_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of music generation. Cost: $0.68 (Suno V5)

tools.name: inpaint
tools.description: Remove or replace objects in an image using AI inpainting. Cost: $0.15. Requires Tier 1+.

media_url.description: URL of the image to edit

prompt.description: What to remove, replace, or change in the image

mask_url.description: Optional mask image URL (white = edit area, black = keep)

tools.name: ai_edit
tools.description: Edit images using AI with natural language prompts. Supports single and multi-image editing. Cost: $0.15. Requires Tier 1+.

media_url.description: URL of the primary image to edit

additional_images.description: Up to 2 additional reference image URLs

aspect_ratio.description: Output aspect ratio (default: match input image)

tools.name: background_remove
tools.description: Remove the background from an image, leaving only the subject with transparency. Cost: $0.10. Requires Tier 1+.

media_url.description: URL of the image to process

tools.name: upscale
tools.description: Upscale/enhance an image to higher resolution using AI. Cost: $0.15. Requires Tier 1+.

media_url.description: URL of the image to upscale

tools.name: video_trim
tools.description: Trim a video to a specific time range. Cost: $0.05. Requires Tier 1+.

media_url.description: URL of the video to trim

tools.name: video_merge
tools.description: Merge multiple video clips into one continuous video. Cost: $0.05. Requires Tier 1+.

media_urls.description: URLs of videos to merge (in playback order)

tools.name: get_operation
tools.description: Get the status and result of an operation. Returns output URL when completed.

operation_id.description: Operation UUID returned from an operation tool
